title: TurboQuant Explained..
summary: TurboQuant is a Google technique that combines KV cache quantization and vector quantization to reduce VRAM requirements and GPU memory pressure for large language models. The method uses codebook-based approaches and optimizes for both mean squared error and inner product error to maintain model quality while achieving compression.
